title: CDIF Codelist profile
description: CDIF profile for controlled-vocabulary codelists. Composes the cdifCodelist building block: a skos:ConceptScheme constrained for CDIF codelist use (resolvable @id; each concept requires @id, skos:inScheme, skos:prefLabel, skos:notation; both skos:narrower and skos:broader required where there is hierarchy). schema: metadata properties (schema:identifier, schema:dateModified, schema:license or schema:conditionsOfAccess) take precedence over the equivalent dcterms properties from the base skos:ConceptScheme.
